title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 8: Webbed Toes
description: Chapter 8 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 8 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Webbed toes and extra fingers seem to come from nature, yet they are excrescences as far as virtue is concerned. The truly straight is what is straight by nature, not what has been bent into shape.
